style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An editorial diptych. On the left, a chaotic tangle of point-to-point connecting lines between many scattered systems, a knot of wires. On the right, the same systems connected cleanly through a single central hub or fabric, orderly spokes radiating out. A sense of a knot resolved into a hub. Muted Alberta cream palette, navy and rust accents, archival print quality, no text.
composed_prompt:
Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.

Subject: An editorial diptych. On the left, a chaotic tangle of point-to-point connecting lines between many scattered systems, a knot of wires. On the right, the same systems connected cleanly through a single central hub or fabric, orderly spokes radiating out. A sense of a knot resolved into a hub. Muted Alberta cream palette, navy and rust accents, archival print quality, no text.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
